page_metadata.biotools__summary: ResSUMO is a web server that could predict lysine sumoylation sites prediction. It takes protein sequence data as input and uses ZScale encoding scheme and One-Dimensional Convolutional Convolutional Neural Network (1-D CNN) based on residual structure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ResSUMO is a web server that could predict lysine sumoylation sites prediction. It takes protein sequence data as input and uses ZScale encoding scheme and One-Dimensional Convolutional Convolutional Neural Network (1-D CNN) based on residual structure.
